title: Claytonia linaria
intro: Claytonia linaria, also known as spring beauty, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Montiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can aid in the management of conditions like arthritis and cancer. The bioactive constituents of Claytonia linaria include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are among the most common herbal preparations made with spring beauty.
